examples.title: Basic code block
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { CodeBlock } from 'cinder/code-block';
  const code = `function greet(name: string): string {
  return \`Hello, \${name}!\`;
}

const message = greet('world');`;
</script>

<CodeBlock {code} />

examples.title: With language label and copy
examples.description: Header shows the language and a copy-to-clipboard button. Syntax highlighting comes from the bundled cinder/highlighters/shiki adapter mounted on a CinderProvider at the page root — examples never wire a per-instance highlighter.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { CinderProvider, CodeBlock } from 'cinder';
  import { shikiHighlighter } from 'cinder/highlighters/shiki';

  const code = `SELECT id, name, created_at
FROM users
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;`;

  // Realistic app shape: mount one provider near the root and let every
  // descendant CodeBlock pick the highlighter up via context. Production
  // apps would do this once at the layout level — this example inlines it
  // only because each .example.svelte renders in isolation.
  const highlighter = shikiHighlighter();
</script>

<CinderProvider {highlighter}>
  <CodeBlock {code} language="sql" copyable />
</CinderProvider>
